name: Blockquote
visual_summary: A blockquote is a visually styled quote which can be used for citing sources or highlighting important text. It's often used to add emphasis or context to a piece of information. Developers would use a blockquote to visually separate a quote from the rest of the content.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready other component with the following characteristics:

Name: Blockquote
Description: A blockquote is a visually styled quote which can be used for citing sources or highlighting important text. It's often used to add emphasis or context to a piece of information. Developers would use a blockquote to visually separate a quote from the rest of the content.
Style: minimal
Interactions: 
Tags: citation, quote, emphasis, text

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
